screen.royalcrown.advisor.title: Advisor
button.royalcrown.advisor.intro3: Tell me what must be done
screen.royalcrown.advisor.intro1.text: Greetings, valiant traveler. I am the Royal Advisor to this colony.
screen.royalcrown.advisor.intro2.text: Rumor has reached mine ears of this new colony — and they say thou art its leader. Yet leadership is no crown.
screen.royalcrown.advisor.intro3.text: Ho, ho! Prudence. To seek the crown is the dream of many; few prove worthy of the Noble Title. Wilt thou be one of them?
screen.royalcrown.advisor.intro4.text:
To be crowned, thou must:
• Have at least %s citizens in the colony;
• Complete %s defenses near the colony.

Wilt thou prove thy worth?
screen.royalcrown.advisor.status.text:
Thou hast not yet proven thy worth. Return once thy tasks are complete!

Progress:
• Citizens: %s/%s
• Defenses: %s/%s
screen.royalcrown.advisor.claim1.text: Splendid! Thou hast shown thyself worthy to lead thy people as a true King.
screen.royalcrown.advisor.claim2.text: In the name of the Crown, I proclaim thee King!
screen.royalcrown.advisor.farewell1.text: Very well — for now my duty here is done, Your Majesty.
screen.royalcrown.advisor.farewell2.text: I shall return anon; till then, may this colony bloom into a Kingdom — yea, an Empire. Fare thee well!
screen.royalcrown.advisor.farewell3.text: This is no farewell, Your Majesty — only a brief parting.
msg.royalcrown.advisor.accepted: §bAdvisor: §fVery well! Prove thy worth and return to me.
msg.royalcrown.advisor.farewell.departed: The Advisor has departed on a journey of uncertain length, yet he shall keep in touch.
msg.royalcrown.advisor.prearrival: The Royal Advisor has heard tell of a new colony. He shall arrive shortly.
msg.royalcrown.advisor.arrived: The Advisor has arrived! Seek him near the Town Hall.
msg.royalcrown.status: §eProgress — Citizens: %s/%s | Defenses: %s/%s | Accepted: %s | Crowned: %s | Ceremony: %s | Crown Owner: %s
msg.royalcrown.ready: §6Trials complete! Speak with the §bRoyal Advisor§6 near the Town Hall to claim the Crown.
msg.royalcrown.coronation.begin: §6The Royal Advisor gathers the colony to witness thy coronation.
msg.royalcrown.coronation.witness: §6The colony bears witness. Stand tall, future King.
msg.royalcrown.coronation.not_ready: §cThe coronation cannot proceed. The royal trials are no longer complete.
msg.royalcrown.coronation.skipped: §eThe ceremony is disabled in config; the crown was granted directly.
cmd.royalcrown.advisor.where.not_found: §bAdvisor: §fI found him not nearby. He oft lingers near the Town Hall.
cmd.royalcrown.help.status: §e/royalcrown status§7 - Shows progress, ceremony state, and crown owner.
cmd.royalcrown.help.advisor_where: §e/royalcrown advisor where§7 - Locates or highlights the Royal Advisor.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_accept: §e/royalcrown debug accept§7 - Marks the trials as accepted.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_complete_defen: §e/royalcrown debug complete_defenses§7 - Completes the defense requirement.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_start_coronati: §e/royalcrown debug start_coronation§7 - Starts the ceremony if requirements are complete.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_reset_player: §e/royalcrown debug reset_player§7 - Resets current player's royal progress.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_clear_crown: §e/royalcrown debug clear_crown§7 - Clears the global crown record.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_give_crown: §e/royalcrown debug give_crown§7 - Gives the crown directly to the current player.
cmd.royalcrown.help.debug_respawn_adviso: §e/royalcrown debug respawn_advisor§7 - Ensures the Advisor near the Town Hall.
cmd.royalcrown.debug.complete_defenses: §7[Debug] Defenses completed for the current player. Colony population is still counted normally.
cmd.royalcrown.debug.give_crown: §7[Debug] Crown given to the current player.
cmd.royalcrown.debug.respawn_advisor: §7[Debug] Advisor ensured near the Town Hall at §e(%s, %s, %s)§7.
adv.royalcrown.root.title: A New Empire? Perchance...
adv.royalcrown.root.desc: Raise thy Colony's Town Hall to Level 1
adv.royalcrown.advisor.title: An Advisor and a Future King
adv.royalcrown.advisor.desc: Welcome the Royal Advisor to thy Colony
adv.royalcrown.accepted.title: Prove Thy Worth
adv.royalcrown.accepted.desc: Accept the trials and prepare to claim the crown
adv.royalcrown.crowned.title: Long Live the King
adv.royalcrown.crowned.desc: Claim the Crown and become the King
